allow: Bash(python -c "import faiss; print\('version:', faiss.__version__\); print\('has GPU:', hasattr\(faiss, 'StandardGpuResources'\)\); print\('num GPUs:', faiss.get_num_gpus\(\) if hasattr\(faiss, 'get_num_gpus'\) else 'n/a'\)")
